name: MapmyIndia Mappls
description: Indias leading mapping and location API platform (C.E. Info Systems) — geocoding, routing, and IoT APIs.

seo.title: MapmyIndia Mappls — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: MapmyIndia Mappls: Indias leading mapping and location API platform (C.E. Info Systems) — geocoding, routing, and IoT APIs.

when_to_use: Geocoding and address APIs tuned for Indian postal data
Routing and navigation for Indian roads and regional maps
IoT tracking and fleet management APIs for Indian logistics
Compliance-friendly Indian mapping alternative to Google Maps
Mappls SDK for consumer apps targeting Indian audiences

pros: Accurate PIN code and address data
IoT and fleet APIs tuned to Indian market
cons: Pricing less transparent than Google Maps
review.verdict: The default maps API for India-first products; Google Maps covers most of the world better elsewhere.
review.best_for: Indian logistics, ride-hailing, and fintech apps
review.not_for: Global apps with only small Indian user base
